summary: Skia milestone bump from chrome/m119 to chrome/m132 (13 milestones). Generated P/Invoke bindings PASS independent regeneration. The upstream integrity layer shows 22 previously-needed fork patches were dropped (incorporated upstream — notably SkFontMgr, SkTypeface, GL interface, and WinRT patches), 2 new fork patches added (Windows GL/WinRT library loading), and 18 modified patches (build system and disabled tooling files). The interop layer has 2 new files (sk_default_fontmgr.cpp/h replacing the removed SkFontMgr::RefDefault), 14 modified C API files adapting to Skia API changes (namespace moves to gpu/ganesh/, font manager refactor, deprecated API removal). DEPS expanded from 17 to 48 entries (31 new upstream deps, 9 version bumps, 0 removed). Risk is HIGH due to upstream integrity changes requiring review.
recommendations: Verify the 22 dropped upstream patches are genuinely incorporated into upstream m132 and not accidentally lost
Review the new sk_default_fontmgr.cpp/h implementation for correctness across all platforms (Emscripten, Android, macOS/iOS, Windows, Unix)
Confirm security dependency pins (libpng, expat, zlib, libjpeg-turbo) in DEPS are at or ahead of upstream versions
Verify deprecated C API functions (sk_maskfilter_new_table/gamma/clip/shader, sk_font_get/set_typeface, sk_typeface_unichar_to_glyph/count_glyphs) are handled in companion PR #3560
Check that the 31 new DEPS entries are standard upstream additions and no unexpected repositories were introduced

generated_files.summary: All 4 generated P/Invoke binding files match independent regeneration. HarfBuzz bindings excluded (not part of Skia update).
recommendations: No action needed — generated files are consistent with C API headers

upstream_integrity.summary: 22 fork patches dropped (incorporated upstream), 2 new patches added, 18 patches modified. The dropped patches are primarily SkFontMgr/SkTypeface additions, GL interface refactors, WinRT support, and lambda const-ref fixes that upstream has now adopted. New patches add Windows GL dynamic loading and WinRT LoadPackagedLibrary support. Changed patches are mostly build system updates (GN files, toolchain config, DEPS) and disabled tooling files.
recommendations: Verify all 22 removed patches correspond to genuine upstream incorporation — spot-check SkFontMgr.h and GrDirectContext.cpp in upstream m132
Review the 2 new upstream patches (GrGLMakeWinInterface.cpp, LoadDynamicLibrary_win.cpp) for correctness
The BUILD.gn and gn/ changes are significant — verify WinRT and ARM64 build paths still work
The DEPS changed entry only shows partial changes — full DEPS audit is in deps_audit section

added.summary: New Windows GL interface that dynamically loads wglGetCurrentContext and wglGetProcAddress via GetProcAddress to improve robustness and support WinRT environments.
No summary available.

changed.summary: Multiple toolchain configuration changes: added static build flag, updated Android/Windows handling, refactored ARM64 logic.
changed.old_diff:
diff --git a/gn/BUILDCONFIG.gn b/gn/BUILDCONFIG.gn
index acf4a5403f..497dff52b7 100644
--- a/gn/BUILDCONFIG.gn
+++ b/gn/BUILDCONFIG.gn
@@ -10,29 +10,47 @@ is_skia_standalone = true
 declare_args() {
   is_official_build = false
   is_component_build = false
+  is_static_skiasharp = false
   ndk = ""
 
   # Android 5.0, Lollipop
   ndk_api = 21
 
+  linux_soname_version = ""
   sanitize = ""
 
   ar = "ar"
   cc = "cc"
   cxx = "c++"
 
-  win_sdk = "C:/Program Files (x86)/Windows Kits/10"
+  win_sdk = ""
+  min_win_sdk_version = "10.0.16299.0"
   win_sdk_version = ""
 
   win_vc = ""
   win_toolchain_version = ""
+  win_vcvars_version = ""
 
   clang_win = ""
   clang_win_version = ""
 
+  ncli = ""
+  ncli_version = "4.0"
+  ncli_gcc_version = "9.2.0"
+  ncli_gcc_version_short = "9.2"
+  ncli_llvm_version = "10"
+
   ios_min_target = ""
+
+  min_ios_version = "8.0"
+  min_tvos_version = "9.0"
+  min_watchos_version = "2.0"
+  min_macos_version = "10.8"
+  min_maccatalyst_version = "13.0"
+
   ios_use_simulator =
-      target_os == "ios" && (target_cpu == "x86" || target_cpu == "x64")
+    (target_os == "ios" || target_os == "tvos" || target_os == "watchos") &&
+    (target_cpu == "x86" || target_cpu == "x64")
 
   # Enable -H, which prints the include tree during compilation.
   # For use by external tools for analyzing include files.
@@ -64,12 +82,16 @@ if (current_os == "") {
 
 is_android = current_os == "android"
 is_fuchsia = current_os == "fuchsia"
-is_ios = current_os == "ios" || current_os == "tvos"
+is_ios = current_os == "ios" || current_os == "tvos" || current_os == "watchos" || current_os == "maccatalyst"
 is_tvos = current_os == "tvos"
-is_linux = current_os == "linux"
+is_watchos = current_os == "watchos"
+is_maccatalyst = current_os == "maccatalyst"
+is_linux = current_os == "linux" || current_os == "tizen"
 is_mac = current_os == "mac"
 is_wasm = current_os == "wasm"
-is_win = current_os == "win"
+is_win = current_os == "win" || current_os == "winrt"
+is_winrt = current_os == "winrt"
+is_tizen = current_os == "tizen"
 
 # This is just to make the Dawn build files happy. Skia itself uses target_os = "linux"
 # for ChromeOS, so this variable will not affect Skia proper.
@@ -91,7 +113,7 @@ if (current_cpu == "") {
   current_cpu = target_cpu
 }
 
-is_clang = is_android || is_ios || is_mac || is_fuchsia || is_wasm ||
+is_clang = is_android || is_ios || is_mac || is_fuchsia || is_tizen || is_wasm ||
            (cc == "clang" && cxx == "clang++") || clang_win != ""
 if (!is_clang && !is_win) {
   is_clang = exec_script("//gn/is_clang.py",
@@ -130,44 +152,56 @@ if (is_android) {
   }
 }
 
-if (target_os == "win") {
+if (is_win) {
   # By default we look for 2017 (Enterprise, Pro, and Community), then 2015. If MSVC is installed in a
   # non-default location, you can set win_vc to inform us where it is.
 
   if (win_vc == "") {
     win_vc = exec_script("//gn/find_msvc.py", [], "trim string")
   }
-  assert(win_vc != "")  # Could not fi

interop_integrity.summary: 2 new C API files added and 14 modified. The major change is the new sk_default_fontmgr system replacing upstream's removed SkFontMgr::RefDefault() and SkTypeface::RefDefault(). GPU API includes moved from include/gpu/ to include/gpu/ganesh/. Several deprecated C API functions marked or removed. Resource provider API changed from boolean to enum parameters.
recommendations: Review sk_default_fontmgr.cpp platform dispatch logic — ensure all SkiaSharp target platforms are covered
Verify sk_font.cpp and sk_typeface.cpp correctly use the new font manager singleton instead of deprecated statics
Check that deprecated/removed C API functions (sk_font_get/set_typeface, sk_typeface_unichar_to_glyph/count_glyphs) are handled in companion C# PR
Verify gr_context.cpp Vulkan context creation simplification doesn't lose GrVkExtensions support
Confirm sk_document.cpp COM factory approach works correctly for XPS on Windows

+/*

+ * Use of this source code is governed by a BSD-style license that can be
+ * found in the LICENSE file.
+ */
+
+#ifndef sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED
+#define sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED
+
+#include "include/core/SkFontMgr.h"
+#include "include/core/SkFontStyle.h"
+#include "include/core/SkRefCnt.h"
+#include "include/core/SkTypeface.h"
+
+// Creates a new platform-appropriate font manager instance.
+sk_sp<SkFontMgr> sk_create_default_fontmgr();
+
+// Returns a cached, thread-safe, platform-appropriate default font manager.
+sk_sp<SkFontMgr> sk_get_default_fontmgr();
+
+// Returns a default typeface from the cached default font manager.
+inline sk_sp<SkTypeface> sk_get_default_typeface() {
+    return sk_get_default_fontmgr()->legacyMakeTypeface("", SkFontStyle::Normal());
+}
+
+#endif // sk_default_fontmgr_DEFINED
